hero.heading: Your Neighborhood Barbershop
hero.subheading: Where tradition meets modern grooming. Experience the best cuts in Glendale since day one.

about.heading: A Cut Above the Rest
paragraphs: Rudy's of Glendale has been the go-to barbershop for men who appreciate the art of a great haircut. Located in the heart of Downtown Glendale, we combine old-school barbering traditions with modern techniques to deliver the perfect cut every time.

Our skilled barbers take pride in creating styles that match your personality. Whether you're looking for a classic taper, a clean fade, or a hot towel shave, we've got you covered. Walk-ins are always welcome.
With a 4.5-star rating and over 65 five-star reviews, Rudy's is where Glendale comes for its best haircuts. Step into our chair and see the difference a real barber makes.

services.title: Classic Haircut
services.description: Precision cut with clippers and shears, finished with a hot towel and styling. Our signature service for the modern gentleman.

services.title: Beard Trim & Shape
services.description: Expert beard grooming including trim, line-up, and hot towel treatment. Keep your beard looking sharp between visits.

services.title: Fade & Taper
services.description: Skin fades, mid fades, and tapers blended to perfection. From subtle to bold — we master every gradient.

services.title: Hot Towel Shave
services.description: Traditional straight razor shave with hot lather, warm towels, and aftershave balm. The ultimate grooming experience.

services.title: Kids' Haircut
services.description: Patient, skilled cuts for the little ones. We make sure every kid leaves the chair happy and looking sharp.

reviews.name: David M.
reviews.text: Best barbershop in Glendale, hands down. Rudy knows exactly how to handle every hair type. I've been coming here for years and never once been disappointed.

reviews.name: Alex K.
reviews.text: Great atmosphere, skilled barbers, and always a clean fade. The hot towel shave is unreal — you feel like a new man walking out.

reviews.name: Mike T.
reviews.text: Finally found a barbershop that gets it right every time. No rushing, no cutting corners. They take their time and the results speak for themselves.

reviews.name: Robert S.
reviews.text: Walked in as a new customer and they treated me like family. Fair prices, incredible skill, and the shop has a great vibe. Highly recommend.

reviews.name: Carlos R.
reviews.text: The fade work here is next level. Clean lines, smooth blends. This is what a real barbershop experience should be.

reviews.name: James W.
reviews.text: I drive 30 minutes just to come here. That should tell you everything you need to know about the quality at Rudy's.

faqs.question: Do I need an appointment?
faqs.answer: Walk-ins are always welcome! We serve customers on a first-come, first-served basis. For the shortest wait, visit us on weekday mornings.

faqs.question: What are your hours?
faqs.answer: We're open Monday 9 AM–3 PM, Tuesday through Friday 7 AM–5 PM, and Saturday 8 AM–3 PM. Closed on Sundays.

faqs.question: Do you cut kids' hair?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! We love working with kids and make sure they have a comfortable, fun experience in the chair.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept cash and all major credit cards for your convenience.

contact.mapEmbedQuery: Rudy's of Glendale, 109 W California Ave, Glendale CA 91203

seo.title: Rudy's of Glendale | Barbershop in Downtown Glendale, CA
seo.description: Classic barbershop in Downtown Glendale offering haircuts, fades, beard trims, and hot towel shaves. 4.5 stars, 65+ reviews. Walk-ins welcome.
